message:
test(labruntime): add 11 deterministic cancellation/concurrency verification tests (ft-e34d9.10.6)

Adds cancellation_labruntime.rs with LabRuntime-based deterministic tests:
- D01-D04: mpsc channel delivery, sender-drop closure, fan-in, semaphore
- D05-D07: concurrent counter, deterministic replay, multi-seed stability
- D08-D09: DPOR schedule exploration for channels and counters
- D10-D11: Chaos fault injection (light + heavy) resilience

All tests use seed-based determinism for reproducible debugging. DPOR
explores 20 schedule interleavings per test. Chaos tests verify invariants
hold under fault injection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
